<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
global $wpdb;
$p = $wpdb->prefix . 'statnive_';

// Seed dimension tables.
$countries = [['US','United States','NA','North America'],['GB','United Kingdom','EU','Europe'],['DE','Germany','EU','Europe'],['FR','France','EU','Europe'],['JP','Japan','AS','Asia']];
foreach ($countries as $c) {
    $wpdb->insert($p.'countries', ['code'=>$c[0],'name'=>$c[1],'continent_code'=>$c[2],'continent'=>$c[3]]);
}

$devices = ['Desktop','Mobile','Tablet'];
foreach ($devices as $d) { $wpdb->insert($p.'device_types', ['name'=>$d]); }

$browsers = ['Chrome','Safari','Firefox','Edge'];
foreach ($browsers as $b) { $wpdb->insert($p.'device_browsers', ['name'=>$b]); }

$oss = ['Windows','macOS','iOS','Android'];
foreach ($oss as $o) { $wpdb->insert($p.'device_oss', ['name'=>$o]); }

$langs = ['en-US','de-DE','ja-JP','fr-FR'];
foreach ($langs as $l) { $wpdb->insert($p.'languages', ['code'=>$l]); }

$refs = [
    ['Organic Search','Google','google.com'],
    ['Social Media','Facebook','facebook.com'],
    ['Direct','',''],
    ['Referral','Reddit','reddit.com'],
    ['Email','Newsletter','mailchimp.com'],
];
foreach ($refs as $r) {
    $wpdb->insert($p.'referrers', ['channel'=>$r[0],'name'=>$r[1],'domain'=>$r[2],'domain_hash'=>crc32($r[2])]);
}

// Seed resource_uris for pages.
$all_posts = get_posts(['post_type'=>['post','page'],'numberposts'=>15,'post_status'=>'publish']);
foreach ($all_posts as $post) {
    $uri = str_replace(home_url(), '', get_permalink($post));
    $wpdb->insert($p.'resource_uris', ['resource_type'=>$post->post_type,'resource_id'=>$post->ID,'uri'=>$uri,'uri_hash'=>crc32($uri)]);
    $wpdb->insert($p.'resources', ['resource_type'=>$post->post_type,'resource_id'=>$post->ID,'cached_title'=>$post->post_title]);
}

echo 'Dimensions seeded: ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}countries") . ' countries, ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}referrers") . ' referrers';

<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
global $wpdb;
$p = $wpdb->prefix . 'statnive_';

$uri_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}resource_uris LIMIT 10");
if (empty($uri_ids)) { echo 'No URIs found'; exit; }
$country_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}countries");
$device_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}device_types");
$browser_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}device_browsers");
$os_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}device_oss");
$lang_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}languages");
$ref_ids = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT ID FROM {$p}referrers");

// Seed 7 days of raw data.
for ($d = 6; $d >= 0; $d--) {
    $date = gmdate('Y-m-d', strtotime("-{$d} days"));
    $daily_visitors = rand(80, 200);
    for ($v = 0; $v < $daily_visitors; $v++) {
        $hash = random_bytes(8);
        $ts = $date . ' ' . sprintf('%02d:%02d:%02d', rand(6,23), rand(0,59), rand(0,59));
        $wpdb->insert($p.'visitors', ['hash'=>$hash, 'created_at'=>$ts]);
        $vid = $wpdb->insert_id;
        if (!$vid) continue;
        $views_count = rand(1, 4);
        $wpdb->insert($p.'sessions', [
            'visitor_id'=>$vid, 'ip_hash'=>$hash, 'started_at'=>$ts,
            'total_views'=>$views_count, 'user_id'=>0, 'duration'=>rand(10, 300),
            'country_id'=>$country_ids[array_rand($country_ids)],
            'device_type_id'=>$device_ids[array_rand($device_ids)],
            'device_browser_id'=>$browser_ids[array_rand($browser_ids)],
            'device_os_id'=>$os_ids[array_rand($os_ids)],
            'language_id'=>$lang_ids[array_rand($lang_ids)],
            'referrer_id'=>$ref_ids[array_rand($ref_ids)],
        ]);
        $sid = $wpdb->insert_id;
        if (!$sid) continue;
        for ($pv = 0; $pv < $views_count; $pv++) {
            $wpdb->insert($p.'views', [
                'session_id'=>$sid,
                'resource_uri_id'=>$uri_ids[array_rand($uri_ids)],
                'viewed_at'=>$date . ' ' . sprintf('%02d:%02d:%02d', rand(6,23), rand(0,59), rand(0,59)),
            ]);
        }
    }
}

echo 'Raw data seeded: ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}visitors") . ' visitors, ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}views") . ' views';

<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
global $wpdb;
$p = $wpdb->prefix . 'statnive_';

// Run aggregation for all 7 days to populate summary tables.
for ($d = 6; $d >= 0; $d--) {
    $date = gmdate('Y-m-d', strtotime("-{$d} days"));
    Statnive\Service\AggregationService::aggregate_day($date);
}

echo 'Aggregation complete: ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}summary_totals") . ' summary_totals rows, ' . $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$p}summary") . ' summary rows';
